market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

title_variants: Spacious 4‑Guest Home, King Bed, Private Lounge
Modern Wetroom, King Bed, Great Value at £101
analysis.rewritten_desc:
Welcome to your stylish, entire‑home retreat in the heart of the city. This bright space comfortably sleeps up to four guests and features a plush king‑size bed, perfect for couples or families seeking a restful night. A unique wetroom adds a touch of luxury, while the private lounge offers a cozy spot to unwind with a book or enjoy a glass of wine after a day of exploring. 

The open‑plan layout includes a fully equipped kitchen, a dining area, and a modern living space where you can relax on comfortable seating. All essentials are provided, and the home is kept immaculate, reflected in its 4.98 rating from 80 glowing reviews. 

At just £101 per night, you’re enjoying a rate that’s 35 % lower than the city’s median nightly price of £154.60, yet the calendar shows a strong 60.9 % occupancy for the next 90 days, leaving only 35 open nights. Host Suzanne, though new to hosting, is committed to delivering a flawless experience. Book now and enjoy a high‑quality stay at unbeatable value.
top_amenity_gaps: Dedicated parking or on‑site parking facilities
Entertainment options (e.g., streaming TV, games, books)
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a bright, well‑staged shot of the private lounge with the king bed visible as the cover photo – it showcases the most attractive, high‑value spaces first.
key_diagnosis: Raise the nightly rate modestly (e.g., to £120) – you’re currently £53 below the cohort median (£154.60) while already booking 60.9% of the next 90 days, so a small increase can boost revenue without harming occupancy.
Add and list high‑value amenities such as outdoor space, parking, and entertainment – these are missing entirely and are proven to attract more searches and higher‑paying guests.
Upload a full set of professional photos covering bedroom, wetroom, private lounge, kitchen, and exterior – the current photo count is unknown, and strong visuals are crucial for conversion.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your home is already booked 61% of the next 90 days at £101/night—just 35% below the market average—so a modest price bump could lift your revenue without hurting occupancy.
